title: BEM-840 request protocol agreement
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem840_protocol_agreement_request.md')
req.write_text('# BEM-840 | REQUEST TO CLAUDE INTERNAL AUDITOR | PROTOCOL AGREEMENT'+sep+sep+'Date: '+created+sep+sep+'Task: jointly agree protocol for further development of the multi-agent AI DevOps system.'+sep+sep+'Operator requirements:'+sep+'1. No fake approval.'+sep+'2. Reports do not stop development.'+sep+'3. GPT external auditor and Claude internal auditor must agree the protocol.'+sep+'4. Include version, date, roles, triggers, mailbox rules, watchdog/timer rules, proof gates, failure handling, and roadmap integration.'+sep+'5. Answer in governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_response.md.'+sep+sep+'Required format:'+sep+'Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED'+sep+'Protocol version:'+sep+'Table: Section | Agreement | Proof/Gate | Owner'+sep+'Open issues:'+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem840_claude_protocol_agreement_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-840 ask Claude internal auditor to agree protocol','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':'protocol_agreement_request_queued','request':str(req),'queue':str(q),'next_action':'tick dispatch queue and verify real Claude protocol response','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_request_claude_protocol_agreement.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_request_claude_protocol_agreement.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Request Claude Protocol Agreement | QUEUED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: tick dispatch queue and verify real Claude protocol response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: protocol_agreement_request_queued'+sep+'Next: tick dispatch queue and verify real Claude protocol response.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(req),str(q),'governance/state/bem840_request_claude_protocol_agreement.json','governance/reports/bem840_request_claude_protocol_agreement.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Created a fresh GPT-to-Claude protocol agreement request and queued Claude dispatcher through workflow_dispatch_queue')
"""
No issue comments.
